top_issue: 31634 is not separately supported; local coding rules suppress Chartis/balloon occlusion when valves are placed in the same session/lobe.
number_of_valves=2 is unsupported; the note documents 3 RUL valves.
31634 is not separately supported once valves are placed in the same session.
31634 is not separately supported in the same LUL valve-placement session.
31634 is not separately supported with same-session RLL valve placement.
inspection_findings retains a false-positive 'mass' despite 'no mass' in the note.
target_lobe='Lingula' is wrong; this is an LUL BLVR case with lingular segment treatment, not a lingula-only session.
31634 is not separately supported in the same-session BLVR case.
number_of_valves=3 is unsupported; the tab log says 4 placed.
Counts and target detail could be richer (RUL posterior segment, TBBx x6, brush x2), but the performed families are correct.
Radial ultrasound is documented, but +31654 is not derived.
diagnostic_bronchoscopy.inspection_findings is polluted by plan symptoms ('hemoptysis, fever, worsening dyspnea').
Counts and richer target detail (TBNA x4, forceps x4, brush x1) could be structured more deeply.
31634 is not supported; the balloon occlusion here is hemostatic after cryobiopsy, not a stand-alone Chartis/air-leak assessment.
Forceps transbronchial biopsy x5 is missed, so 31628-level lung biopsy work is undercalled.
inspection_findings implies a lesion even though the note says no lesion was seen.
number_of_valves=2 is unsupported; the note documents 3 valves.
number_of_valves=1 is unsupported; the note documents two valves.
number_of_valves=3 is unsupported; the valve list documents 2.
31622 is left as the bronchoscopic code even though the note explicitly says two valves were deployed.
Double-lumen tube placement and sequential lavage-cycle detail are not structured, but the core procedure is correct.
diagnostic_bronchoscopy.inspection_findings implies obstruction even though the note says no endobronchial obstruction.
Could preserve that today's staged lavage was the right lung and carry through the aliquot/effluent sequence.
The procedure is bucketed as pleural_biopsy even though the note describes an ultrasound-guided transthoracic core needle biopsy of a pleural-based lung/chest-wall lesion.
US-guided transthoracic core biopsy is missed entirely.
Dynamic bronchoscopy with forced-expiratory assessment and CPAP titration is missed entirely.
Intralesional Kenalog injection is not structurally represented, but the core rigid bronchoscopy plus balloon dilation workflow is correct.
BAL/31624 is not supported; the note lists BAL as optional, but the performed technique documents foreign-body retrieval without lavage.
Forceps assistance and moderate-sedation detail are not richly structured, but the therapeutic aspiration event is correctly captured.
sedation.type='Moderate' is wrong; the procedure was performed under GA despite the stale header.
Only diagnostic bronchoscopy + balloon occlusion are represented, but the note clearly documents endobronchial Watanabe spigot placement.
Balloon dilation is bundled into the same-site 31641 treatment logic; minimal oozing is appropriately not turned into a complication.
31636 is the wrong stent family; this is a silicone Y-stent spanning distal trachea/carina, so tracheal/Y-stent logic is more appropriate than initial bronchial-stent logic.
Cryospray airway ablation is missed entirely.
Mild bronchospasm treated with bronchodilator is not deeply structured, but the thermoplasty session itself is correctly captured.
Simultaneous billing of 31660 and 31661 is internally inconsistent; only one thermoplasty family code should survive for a single session.
Selective intubation/endobronchial tamponade with blocker placement is missed entirely as a therapeutic event.
Bronchoscopic methylene-blue evaluation for tracheoesophageal fistula is missed entirely.
Pass count for station 7 is not explicitly preserved.
Simultaneous 31652 and 43238 coding for the same EUS-B sampling episode may be duplicative/gray-zone rather than cleanly cumulative.
Large cast extraction with cryoprobe/forceps is collapsed into generic therapeutic aspiration, which understates the extraction technique.
Complications/bleeding grade 1 are unsupported; the note says complications none and only minimal mucosal bleeding was controlled routinely.
Bronchoscopic brachytherapy-catheter placement is missed entirely.
31622 is not cleanly supported in addition to 31615 for bronchoscopy through an established tracheostomy.
Limited laryngeal/airway inspection with vocal-cord motion assessment is missed entirely.
Pressure at the stoma is carried as an outcomes complication intervention even though the note states 'complications none' and describes routine mild bleeding control.
stent_brand='ENT' is unsupported and appears to be a substring artifact from the word 'stent'.
Topical mitomycin C adjunct is not structurally represented, but the core dilation case is correct.
32604 is the wrong thoracoscopy code family; local coding rules point medical thoracoscopy/pleuroscopy with pleural biopsies toward the 32650 family.
Exact tPA/DNase doses are variably documented and are appropriately not hallucinated.
